summary: Bug Fix Testing Complete - All Search, Filter, Pagination and Mobile functionality on /en/explore page working correctly. All 19 test cases passed.
critical_code_review_comments: ExplorePage.jsx correctly implements pagination (24 cards initially, Load More button for remaining)
FavoriteButton deferStatusCheck prop properly defers API calls on list pages (161 cards no longer fire 161 API calls)
RecipeCard passes deferFavoriteCheck=true on explore page grid
searchParams clone fix prevents stale state issues
sync effect properly handles URL param clearing on browser back button
Search includes dish_type field - searching 'dessert' returns 22 recipes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pagination, search, filter bugs fixed. Total recipes: 161, shows 24 initially with Load More. FavoriteButton defers status check on list pages. Search includes dish_type field. Browser back button properly clears URL params and filters.

verified_features.feature: DESKTOP: /en/explore loads with 24 recipe cards initially
verified_features.details: Initial load shows exactly 24 cards (pagination working)

verified_features.feature: DESKTOP: recipe count shows '161 recipes' total
verified_features.details: Total count correctly displayed as '161 recipes'

verified_features.feature: DESKTOP: 'Load More' button visible and functional
verified_features.details: Load More button shows '137 remaining', clicking adds 24 more cards (24 -> 48)
Search 'dessert' returns 22 recipes - dish_type field search working

verified_features.feature: DESKTOP: Dish Type filter 'Desserts' shows ~22 recipes
verified_features.details: Dish Type filter correctly shows 22 dessert recipes
Continent filter correctly shows 129 European recipes
Combined filtering shows 2 results (Pasta alla Genovese, Pasta e patate alla napoletana)

verified_features.feature: DESKTOP: Clear all filters resets to 161 recipes
verified_features.details: Clear all button resets to 161 recipes and 24 visible cards with Load More button

verified_features.feature: DESKTOP: Filter tags with X button
verified_features.details: Search and filter tags appear with X buttons for individual removal
Continent sub-page shows 'Countries in Europe' section with country links (Spain 74, Italy 42, etc.), filter bar hidden

verified_features.feature: DESKTOP: Browser back button clears filter
verified_features.details: After applying dishType=dessert, back button clears URL param and resets to 161 recipes

verified_features.feature: MOBILE: Page loads with recipe cards visible
verified_features.details: Mobile viewport (390x844) shows 24 recipe cards (not blank)

verified_features.feature: MOBILE: Search input visible and functional
verified_features.details: Search input works on mobile - 'pizza' search returns 1 recipe

verified_features.feature: MOBILE: Dish Type filter opens and works
verified_features.details: Dropdown opens, selecting Desserts shows 22 recipes

verified_features.feature: MOBILE: Continent filter opens and works
verified_features.details: Dropdown opens, selecting Europe shows 129 recipes

verified_features.feature: MOBILE: Recipe count updates after filter
verified_features.details: Recipe count correctly updates to reflect filter selections
Clear all button resets filters back to 161 recipes

notes: Console shows 401 errors for /api/favorites/status calls which is expected for non-logged-in users. FavoriteButton deferStatusCheck prop prevents these calls on initial load (only checks on click interaction).
